rationale: Evidence gathering aborted with status 'partial_honesty_abort' before independent verification could be performed. Per absence-of-failure guard #5, when gathering_status != 'complete', all null verification fields constitute ABSENT SIGNAL and cannot be treated as passing. All major verification fields (tests, bdd, independent_tests, quality_gates, coverage_details) are null. The abort was triggered by path string formatting errors in the Player's report (backtick-prefixed file paths that don't exist on disk). While the Player's files_authored array shows correct absolute paths suggesting the work may have been done, I cannot approve without independent verification of implementation correctness, test passage, and security requirements (especially AC-003 path traversal safety). The Player must fix the report formatting and resubmit to enable complete evidence gathering.
